name: @dracondev/opencode-auto-continue
description: Auto-continue stalled OpenCode sessions — stall recovery, todo nudging, review on completion, and AI-driven session analysis
author: dracon

scripts.sync: npm run build && node -e "const p=require('./package.json');const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');fs.writeFileSync('./dist/package.json',JSON.stringify({name:p.name,version:p.version,main:'./index.js',types:'./index.d.ts',description:p.description,peerDependencies:p.peerDependencies},null,2)+'\n');console.log('sync: dist/package.json v'+p.version);const plugDir=path.join(process.env.HOME||'/tmp','.config','opencode','plugins','opencode-auto-continue');let needLink=true;try{const stat=fs.lstatSync(plugDir);if(stat.isSymbolicLink()){const target=fs.readlinkSync(plugDir);if(target===path.resolve('./dist')){console.log('symlink already correct:',plugDir,'->',target);needLink=false;}else{console.log('replacing stale symlink:',plugDir,'(was',target,')');fs.unlinkSync(plugDir);}}else{console.log('removing existing plugin dir:',plugDir);fs.rmSync(plugDir,{recursive:true});}}catch(e){if(e.code!=='ENOENT')console.log('check symlink:',e.message);}if(needLink){fs.symlinkSync(path.resolve('./dist'),plugDir,'dir');console.log('created symlink:',plugDir,'->',path.resolve('./dist'));}"
